## Task 1: Fix wave-8-agent-1-bug-1 -- SmithingTemplateItems.kt constructor arity not version-gated
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/item/SmithingTemplateItems.kt
**From bugs:** wave-8-agent-1-bug-1 (severity P0, category missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- SmithingTemplateItem constructor call is stonecutter-gated by version: 7-arg form (no Item.Properties) for 1.20.1; verified correct arg form for 1.21.1; 8-arg form with Item.Properties for >=1.21.2
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` passes on all 5 versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2) with no unresolved-reference errors in this file

### Context
```
SmithingTemplateItem(...8 args including 'props' unconditionally on all versions)
```

## Task 2: Fix wave-8-agent-1-bug-2, bug-3, bug-6, bug-8 -- SmithingTemplateLootInjector.kt multiple version-gate failures
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/loot/SmithingTemplateLootInjector.kt
**From bugs:** wave-8-agent-1-bug-2 (severity P0), wave-8-agent-1-bug-3 (severity P0), wave-8-agent-1-bug-6 (severity P0), wave-8-agent-1-bug-8 (severity P0)

### Acceptance criteria
- The `LootTableEvents.MODIFY` lambda is stonecutter-gated: 3-param form `{ key, builder, source -> }` for versions where MODIFY supplies 3 params (1.20.1, 1.21.1); 4-param form `{ key, builder, source, _ -> }` for versions where it supplies 4 params
- The `import net.fabricmc.fabric.api.loot.v2.LootTableEvents` import is stonecutter-gated: for >=26.1.2 use the new qualified import path; for older versions keep `loot.v2`
- The `builder.pool(LootPool.lootPool()...build())` loot pool injection block is stonecutter-gated for 1.20.1 using the correct 1.20.1 loot builder API
- `key.location().toString()` call is stonecutter-gated: split the >=1.21.1 block into `>=1.21.1 <1.21.11` (using `.location()`) and `>=1.21.11` (using the renamed method)
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` passes on all 5 versions with no unresolved-reference errors in this file

### Context
```
// bug-2: line 35
LootTableEvents.MODIFY.register { key, builder, source, _ -> ... }

// bug-3: line 6
import net.fabricmc.fabric.api.loot.v2.LootTableEvents

// bug-6: line 43
builder.pool(LootPool.lootPool()...build())

// bug-8: line 37
val tableId = key.location().toString()
```

## Task 3: Fix wave-8-agent-1-bug-4, bug-5, bug-7 -- SmithingTemplateTrades.kt multiple version-gate failures
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/trade/SmithingTemplateTrades.kt
**From bugs:** wave-8-agent-1-bug-4 (severity P0), wave-8-agent-1-bug-5 (severity P0), wave-8-agent-1-bug-7 (severity P0)

### Acceptance criteria
- `registerWanderingTraderOffers` call is stonecutter-gated: split `>=1.21.1` into `>=1.21.1 <1.21.11` (with Int level argument) and `>=1.21.11` (without level argument)
- `import net.fabricmc.fabric.api.object.builder.v1.trade.TradeOfferHelper` is stonecutter-gated: for >=26.1.2 use the new import path; for older versions keep the v1 path
- The 1.20.1 stonecutter block uses `VillagerTrades.ItemListing { entity, random -> ... }` (not `TradeListing`) with the correct MerchantOffer constructor
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` passes on all 5 versions with no unresolved-reference errors in this file

### Context
```
// bug-4: line 23
TradeOfferHelper.registerWanderingTraderOffers(2) { factories -> ... }

// bug-5: line 6
import net.fabricmc.fabric.api.`object`.builder.v1.trade.TradeOfferHelper

// bug-7: line 46
VillagerTrades.TradeListing { _, _ -> ... }
```

## Task 4: Fix wave-1-agent-4-bug-1, wave-1-agent-4-bug-2, wave-1-agent-5-bug-1, wave-1-agent-5-bug-2, wave-4-agent-2-bug-1, wave-4-agent-2-bug-2 -- Canonicalize all recipe tag/item-ref formats
**Files:**
- src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/diamond_template_fragment.json
- src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/netherite_template_fragment.json
- src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/diamond_weapon_upgrade_template_assemble.json
- src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/netherite_weapon_upgrade_template_assemble.json
- src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/longsword_diamond.json (representative of all 54 generated smithing_transform recipes)
**From bugs:** wave-1-agent-4-bug-1 (P1), wave-1-agent-4-bug-2 (P1), wave-1-agent-5-bug-1 (P1), wave-1-agent-5-bug-2 (P1), wave-4-agent-2-bug-1 (P1), wave-4-agent-2-bug-2 (P1)

### Acceptance criteria
- All recipe files that reference tags use the `"#c:..."` string-prefix form consistently (no `{ "tag": "c:..." }` object form anywhere in data/dndweapons/recipe/)
- All 56 smithing_transform recipes (54 codegen-generated + 2 hand-authored assembly recipes) use a single canonical item-ref format for `template`, `base`, and `result` fields compatible with all 5 MC versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2)
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` passes with no recipe parse errors on all 5 versions
- `./gradlew chiseledRunGametest` passes with no recipe-related failures

### Context
```
// wave-1-agent-4-bug-1: diamond_template_fragment.json line 7
"D": { "tag": "c:gems/diamond" }
// expected: "D": "#c:gems/diamond"

// wave-1-agent-4-bug-2: netherite_template_fragment.json line 7
"S": { "tag": "c:gems/quartz" }
// expected: "S": "#c:gems/quartz"

// wave-1-agent-5-bug-1: diamond_weapon_upgrade_template_assemble.json line 3
"addition": { "tag": "c:gems/diamond" }
// expected: "addition": "#c:gems/diamond"

// wave-1-agent-5-bug-2: netherite_weapon_upgrade_template_assemble.json line 5
"addition": { "tag": "c:ingots/netherite" }
// expected: "addition": "#c:ingots/netherite"

// wave-4-agent-2-bug-1: longsword_diamond.json lines 3-4
"template": { "item": "dndweapons:diamond_weapon_upgrade_template" },
"base":     { "item": "dndweapons:longsword" },
// MC 1.20.1 uses {item:...}, MC 1.20.5+ uses {id:...} - needs resolution

// wave-4-agent-2-bug-2: longsword_diamond.json line 5
"addition": "#c:gems/diamond"
// This is correctly formatted per #-prefix convention; the conflict is the
// hand-authored files (bugs 1-4 above) which still use object form
```

---

## Task 5: Fix wave-5-agent-2-bug-1 -- SmithingGametest does not simulate in-world smithing craft
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/SmithingGametest.kt
**From bug:** wave-5-agent-2-bug-1 (severity P1, category missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- `runDiamondPreservesSpec` helper performs an in-world smithing craft: simulate SmithingTransformRecipe with longsword + diamond_weapon_upgrade_template + diamond ingredient
- Obtain output ItemStack from the simulated craft and assert: item id matches `longsword_diamond`, attackDamage = base spec attackDamage + Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus, baseDurability = 1561, relevant properties (VERSATILE etc.) preserved
- Test method name `smithingDiamondUpgradePreservesSpec` continues to pass on all 5 versions
- `./gradlew chiseledRunGametest` passes with 13 mod tests per version

### Context
```
private fun runDiamondPreservesSpec(ctx: GameTestHelper) {
    val item = BuiltInRegistries.ITEM.get(itemId)...;
    val spec = SpecRegistry.lookup(item) ?: throw ...;
    if (spec.id != "longsword_diamond") ...
}
// Current test only checks registry - never exercises the smithing table recipe
```

## Task 6: Fix wave-2-agent-1-bug-1 -- WeaponSpecAtTierTest netherite case missing fire flag assertion
**File:** src/test/kotlin/com/dndweapons/catalog/WeaponSpecAtTierTest.kt
**From bug:** wave-2-agent-1-bug-1 (severity P2, category missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- `atTierNetheriteSuffixesIdAndAddsTwoDamage` test asserts `assertTrue(Tier.NETHERITE.fireImmune)`
- All 4 WeaponSpecAtTierTest tests continue to pass

### Context
```
@Test
fun atTierNetheriteSuffixesIdAndAddsTwoDamage() {
    val netherite = Weapons.GREATAXE.atTier(Tier.NETHERITE)
    assertEquals("greataxe_netherite", netherite.id)
    assertEquals("Netherite Greataxe", netherite.displayName)
    assertEquals(Weapons.GREATAXE.attackDamage + 2, netherite.attackDamage)
    assertEquals(2031, netherite.baseDurability)
    // missing: assertTrue(Tier.NETHERITE.fireImmune)
}
```

## Task 8: Fix wave-5-agent-2-bug-2 -- Hardcoded '+1' in AssertionError message
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/SmithingGametest.kt
**From bug:** wave-5-agent-2-bug-2 (severity P3, category incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- The AssertionError message uses `Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus` instead of the literal `1`
- No other behavior changes

### Context
```
throw AssertionError("Expected attackDamage ${baseSpec.attackDamage + 1}, got ${spec.attackDamage}")
// should be:
throw AssertionError("Expected attackDamage ${baseSpec.attackDamage + Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus}, got ${spec.attackDamage}")
```
